purpose: Classify all Cloudflare-capable authority surfaces that could mutate the production MindShift worker outside the canonical legitimacy chain.
classification_invariant: No Cloudflare production mutation path exists outside the governed deployment lineage.

surfaces.authority_source: Cloudflare account-level Git Integration (automatic deploy on push)
surfaces.bypass_condition: Git Integration enabled on account; push to tracked branch triggers deploy outside canonical chain
surfaces.containment_action: Disable Git Integration at Cloudflare account level for the mindshift-demo worker. Cannot be enforced from wrangler.toml; requires account-level administrative action.
surfaces.observability: EXTERNAL_ONLY — deploy events visible in Cloudflare dashboard and Workers analytics; not visible to MindShift proof registry

surfaces.authority_source: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN or CF_API_TOKEN with Workers:Write scope
surfaces.bypass_condition: Token holder runs wrangler deploy directly, bypassing governed-deploy.yml and the canonical chain
surfaces.containment_action: Scope token to minimum required permissions. Rotate token after each use or bind to GitHub Actions OIDC. Classify as root break-glass authority.
surfaces.observability: PARTIAL — wrangler deploy emits Cloudflare deployment record; not bound to MindShift proof registry unless governed workflow ran

surfaces.bypass_condition: Preview deploy targets separate worker with no production D1 binding; cannot execute governed canonical routes against production state
surfaces.containment_action: wrangler.toml [env.preview] isolates preview worker. No production D1 binding in preview environment.
surfaces.observability: N/A — preview cannot reach production surfaces

surfaces.authority_source: Authenticated local wrangler CLI session with production credentials
surfaces.bypass_condition: Local developer with CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN runs wrangler deploy without governed wrapper, bypassing canonical chain
surfaces.containment_status: PARTIAL — package.json deploy script disabled; governed-deploy.ts enforces context guard
surfaces.containment_action: package.json deploy script exits 1. Governed-deploy.ts rejects deploys outside MINDSHIFT_GOVERNED_DEPLOY_CONTEXT=github_actions_governed. Requires both a valid canonical artifact AND the governed context variable. Classified as root authority; requires account-level token restriction for full containment.
surfaces.observability: AUDIT_LOG — governed-deploy.ts emits deploy_audit_registry.json entry for all invocations including rejections

surfaces.authority_source: workflow_dispatch on governed-deploy.yml, entered through governed legitimacy chain
surfaces.bypass_condition: workflow_dispatch with fabricated decision_id/validated_object_hash/invocation_nonce; requires /compile hash match to pass
surfaces.containment_status: GOVERNED — canonical chain validated before deploy; replay protection via nonce reservation
surfaces.containment_action: Caller workflow ref validated. All seven canonical endpoints must return canonical responses. Replay rejected. Authority expiry derived from /authority response.
surfaces.observability: FULL — all canonical chain responses uploaded as GitHub Actions artifacts; proof persisted in MindShift proof registry

CF-001_git_integration.enforcement: EXTERNAL — cannot be enforced from repository code
CF-001_git_integration.verification: Account administrator must confirm Git Integration is disabled for the mindshift-demo worker
CF-001_git_integration.break_glass: If Git Integration is re-enabled, all subsequent deploys must be treated as ungoverned production mutations

CF-002_api_token.action: Scope to Workers:Write for production only under GitHub Actions OIDC
CF-002_api_token.verification: Token rotation policy required; last-used audit in Cloudflare dashboard

CF-004_local_wrangler.action: Classified as root break-glass authority; requires both token AND governed context
CF-004_local_wrangler.verification: Any local deploy attempt emits to deploy_audit_registry.json

git_integration_containment.rationale: Cloudflare Git Integration deploys on push outside the canonical MindShift legitimacy chain. The integration bypasses /session, /continuity, /authority, /compile, /validate, /execute, and /proof entirely. There is no MindShift-enforceable control that can block this; it requires account-level disablement.
git_integration_containment.required_account_action: Disable Cloudflare Workers Git Integration for the mindshift-demo worker in the Cloudflare dashboard under Workers & Pages > mindshift-demo > Settings > Build & deployments
git_integration_containment.wrangler_toml_separation: [env.preview] added to wrangler.toml to ensure any remaining Git Integration targets only the preview environment (non-production, no production D1 binding)
